title: submit-flow-batch input spec
description: Wraps a JSON list of submit-flow specs that share `(ssh_target, remote_path)`. The batch atom does ONE rsync_push + ONE deploy_runtime + N qsubs (multiplexed via the ssh ControlMaster) instead of N times the per-spec submit-flow pipeline. Use whenever a campaign iteration or multi-executor /submit-hpc emits >1 specs to the same cluster; heterogeneous (different ssh_target or remote_path) batches raise spec_invalid. Each list element under `specs` MUST individually validate against submit_flow.input.json (the CLI loads that schema and validates per-entry); this wrapper schema only constrains the outer shape so an agent or external orchestrator can sanity-check the bundle without doing the per-entry validation itself.

items.description: A submit-flow spec; full field-level contract lives in submit_flow.input.json.

rsync_excludes.description: Optional rsync exclude patterns applied once across the bundle.

skip_preflight.description: Skip the single ssh probe; default false.
